sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ مَرْيَمُ إِلَى السُّوقِ لِشِرَاءِ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je otišla na pijacu da kupi svježe povrće.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam went to the market to buy fresh vegetables.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتِ الطَّمَاطِمَ وَالْخِيَارَ وَالْبَقْدُونِسَ لِتَحْضِيرِ السَّلَطَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupila je paradajz, krastavce i peršun za pripremu salate.
sentences.translationEn: She bought tomatoes, cucumbers, and parsley to prepare a salad.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْأَسْعَارُ جَيِّدَةً وَالْبَائِعُ لَطِيفًا جِدًّا مَعَهَا.
sentences.translation: Cijene su bile dobre, a prodavač je bio veoma ljubazan prema njoj.
sentences.translationEn: The prices were good and the seller was very kind to her.
